text: Love it here so much! Stephanie is THE best laser technician ever. Never ever leaving this place, mostly because of her. Entire staff is also so friendly. 100% recommend this place!
author: Isabella Gonzalez

text: Stephanie is AWESOME!! She makes me feel like family. Everyone is awesome! Great place would recommend it to everyone.
author: Esmeralda Hernandez

text: This is one of my FAVORITE med spas. The staff, the quality of the services and their care for their customers is what keeps me coming back. I live in another state and I fly in once or twice a year to get maintenance done and I will continue to do it!
author: Emily Jookar

text: Laser hair removal has been one of the best investments I’ve made. Stephanie, my laser specialist, is exceptionally friendly and creates a comfortable experience. I highly recommend her—she is truly outstanding.
author: K C

text: I’ve been going to Stephanie Parisi for years, and I honestly wouldn’t trust anyone else. She is hands down the best laser hair removal tech out there. The attention and care she gives every session really sets her apart she makes you feel comfortable, heard, and taken care of. You can tell she truly cares about her clients and the results. Highly recommend her to anyone looking for top quality service!
author: Veronica Suarez

text: I highly recommend Callie! She’s nice, personable and super talented at what she does. I got therapeutic Botox with her to control some of how my body sweats - and it’s made all the difference! I’ll be seeing her again!
author: Richard Minichiello

text: I’ve been here for multiple services and always the best experience! Recently, I saw Callie for Botox. She is incredibly thorough and knowledgeable. I had Botox in my forehead, and eyes. Let me tell you- the confidence when you have a refreshed youthful look…it’s the best!!! I just feel so happy with my results! I’m a fan 1000%! Highly recommend to go see Callie!
author: Jamie Woodside

text: I highly recommend Skintellect! I got Botox done by Callie and she does an amazing job explaining any questions I had! I trust her and the staff at skintellect! I also had gotten laser hair removal by Cristina and I’m seeing amazing results as well !
author: Celeste Cortes
